license.rule.noCopyPermission: Others cannot copy, distribute, or perform your work without your permission (or as permitted by fair use).
license.rule.attribution: Others can distribute, remix, and build upon your work as long as they credit you.
license.rule.noDerivatives: Others can only distribute non-derivative copies of your work.
license.rule.shareAlike: Others must distribute derivatives of your work under the same license.
license.rule.nonCommercial: Others can use your work for non-commercial purposes only.
license.rule.waiveRights: You waive all your copyright and related rights in this work, worldwide.

site.title: Circlo Community
site.name: Circlo Community
cookieConsent.messageText: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.
cookieConsent.category.strictlyNecessary: Necessary for the website to function

These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
cookieConsent.category.functional.name: Functional Cookies
cookieConsent.category.functional.detail: These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
cookieConsent.category.targeting.name: Targeting Cookies
cookieConsent.category.targeting.shortDe: Build a profile of your interests
cookieConsent.category.targeting.detaile: These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
cookieConsent.category.performance.name: Performance Cookies
cookieConsent.category.performance.detai: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

checkout.title: Account Upgrade
checkout.subtitle: Unlock premium features
checkout.description: To continue using the platform, please upgrade your account to a paid subscription. This helps us maintain and improve the community.
checkout.successMessage: Thank you for your payment! Your account has been upgraded.
checkout.verifyingMessage: Please wait while we confirm your payment status...
emails.admin_created_user.subject: Your account has been created
emails.admin_created_user.text: An account has been created for you. Here are your login details:
emails.admin_created_user.password_notic: Please use this password for your first login. We recommend changing it in your profile settings immediately after logging in. If you have trouble logging in, make sure to copy the password exactly as shown, without any extra spaces.
emails.verification.subject: Verification Code
emails.verification.footer: This code will expire in 10 minutes. If you did not request this, please ignore this email.
emails.reset_password.subject: Reset password
emails.reset_password.text: You have requested to reset your password. Use the code below to proceed:
emails.reset_password.footer: This code is valid for 1 hour. If you did not request a password reset, no further action is required.
emails.email_change.subject: Email Change Verification
emails.email_change.text: You have requested to change your email address. Please use the following verification code to confirm this action:
emails.email_change.warning: If you did not request this change, please ignore this email or contact support if you have concerns about your account security.
emails.email_change.footer: This code is valid for 15 minutes.
